_comment: Boxes needed for Team Scanner OCR. Run: python3 tools/pixel_inspector.py --measure

boxes.name: moves_more/tab_label
boxes.description: The 'Moves & More' tab label text at the top (for screen detection)

boxes.name: moves_more/card_bg_0
boxes.description: Solid purple background region inside card 0 (Garchomp) — for color-gate detection

boxes.name: moves_more/species_0
boxes.description: Species name 'Garchomp' text — top-left card (card 0). Crop tightly around the text only.

boxes.name: moves_more/species_1
boxes.description: Species name 'Venusaur' text — top-right card (card 1). Same height/width as species_0, shifted right.

boxes.name: moves_more/species_2
boxes.description: Species name 'Charizard' text — middle-left card (card 2). Same as species_0, shifted down one row.

boxes.name: moves_more/ability_0
boxes.description: Ability name 'Rough Skin' text in card 0 (Garchomp). Below species name, smaller text.

boxes.name: moves_more/move_0_0
boxes.description: First move 'Earthquake' text in card 0 (Garchomp). After the type icon, just the move name text.

boxes.name: moves_more/move_0_1
boxes.description: Second move 'Rock Slide' text in card 0 (Garchomp).

boxes.name: moves_more/move_0_2
boxes.description: Third move 'Dragon Claw' text in card 0 (Garchomp).

boxes.name: moves_more/move_0_3
boxes.description: Fourth move 'Stomping Tantrum' text in card 0 (Garchomp). Last move — used to compute vertical spacing.

boxes.name: team_reg/species_0
boxes.description: First species name 'Garchomp' in the team list (left column, top slot).

boxes.name: team_reg/species_5
boxes.description: Last species name 'Incineroar' in the team list (left column, bottom slot). Used with species_0 to compute vertical spacing.

boxes.name: team_reg/team_tab_bg
boxes.description: The green/yellow 'Team 1' (or 'Team 2') selected tab background — for color-gate detection of this screen.
